title: Task
description: A Snowflake task, used to execute SQL code.

comment.description: Specifies a comment for the task.

finalize.description: Specifies the name of the root task that the finalizer task is associated with.

task_auto_retry_attempts.description: Root task settable only. Specifies the number of automatic task graph retry attempts. Valid range is 0 to 30. When not specified, no retry would happen.

session_parameters.description: Session Parameters for the task at runtime.

definition.description: The SQL definition for the task. Any one of single SQL statement, call to stored procedure, or procedural logic using Snowflake scripting.

predecessors.description: Specifies one or more predecessor tasks for the current task

task_relations.description: Displays the relationship between the root task and its corresponding finalizer tasks.

user_task_managed_initial_warehouse_size.description: Specifies the size of the compute resources to provision for the first run of the task. This parameter only applies to serverless tasks.

serverless_task_min_statement_size.description: Specifies the minimum allowed warehouse size for the serverless task. Minimum XSMALL, Maximum XXLARGE. This parameter only applies to serverless tasks.

serverless_task_max_statement_size.description: Specifies the maximum allowed warehouse size for the serverless task. Minimum XSMALL, Maximum XXLARGE. This parameter only applies to serverless tasks.

user_task_timeout_ms.description: Specifies the time limit on a single run of the task before it times out (in milliseconds).

suspend_task_after_num_failures.description: Specifies the number of consecutive failed task runs after which the current task is suspended automatically.

condition.description: Specifies a Boolean SQL expression condition; multiple conditions joined with AND/OR are supported

allow_overlapping_execution.description: Specifies whether to allow multiple instances of the DAG to run concurrently.

error_integration.description: Specifies the name of the notification integration used to communicate with Amazon SNS, MS Azure Event Grid, or Google Pub/Sub.

created_on.description: The time the task was created on.

id.description: An ID for the current task.

owner.description: The role that owns the task.

owner_role_type.description: The role type of the task owner.

state.description: The state of the task. Must be one of started or suspended.

last_committed_on.description: The time the task was last committed on.

last_suspended_on.description: The time the task was last suspended on.

database_name.description: The name of the parent database for the task.

schema_name.description: The name of the parent schema for the task.
